title: Styleformer
summary:
A Neural Language Style Transfer framework to transfer natural language text smoothly between fine-grained language styles like formal/casual, active/passive, and many more. Created by Prithiviraj Damodaran. Open to pull requests and other forms of collaboration. 
 A Neural Language Style Transfer framework to transfer natural language text smoothly between fine-grained language styles like formalcasual, activepassive, and many more.For instance, understand What makes text formal or casualinform
